stories.title: The Pro Tour tech still hasn't reached the ladder
stories.summary: A fortnight ago the site flagged six Pro Tour staples the ladder hadn't adopted and expected at least two to cross over. None have.

stats.label: Prior call
stats.value: the 11-05 story expected 2+ to cross over within a fortnight

stories.detail: Pro Tour results usually seed ladder tech within a week or two. This time they haven't. The honest read is that either the ladder is unusually slow this cycle, or this Pro Tour's best cards are tuned for a field the ladder does not have.

stories.title: Erode's breakout held
stories.summary: Erode has sat near 20% of winning ladder lists for three straight weeks. The fast riser flagged a fortnight ago consolidated instead of fading.
stories.detail: Cards that spike quickly usually fall back just as fast. Erode did not. Three weeks after crossing into double digits it is steady at around a fifth of winning ladder lists, which marks it as a settled fixture rather than a one-week spike.

stories.status_note: the return did not hold; the shell was gone again by 18-05
stories.title: Rakdos Boggart back at peak density
stories.summary: A red-black goblin shell vanished for the six weeks before the Pro Tour, then came back at its densest ever the week after.
stories.detail: Two players brought it back independently in the same week, with no overlap in supporting cards beyond the core. The colors and the timing read as a counter-pick against the post-PT field rather than a fluke.

stories.status_note: Erode held near 20%; see the 18-05 follow-up
stories.title: Erode: 0 to 20 percent in two weeks
stories.summary: Erode was not on ladder two weeks ago. One in five winning lists runs it now, the largest single-card jump in the dataset.

stats.label: Shell
stats.value: Dyadrine, Hardened Academic, Flitterwing Nuisance, Shardmage's Rescue, Lumbering Worldwagon

stories.detail: The shell behind it had been drifting in fringe lists for weeks. Erode pulled it into a winning configuration.

stories.status_note: the predicted crossover did not happen; see the 18-05 follow-up
stories.title: Five PT staples ladder has not touched
stories.summary: Five cards pros are betting on that the ladder has not picked up. Each above 5 percent at the Pro Tour, near zero on ranked ladder.
stories.detail: Erode hit this exact profile two weeks ago and is now at 20 percent ladder share. Expect at least two of these five to follow over the next fortnight.
